backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Sound Waves Publishing platform, defining all core data types (ArtistProfile, MediaMetadata, PurchaseRecord, TrademarkRecord, LightscribeLabelProject, etc.) and including mixins for storage, authorization, and payment integrations (Stripe, MerchantServices, NationalBankcard).
backend/migration.mo: Minimal migration module that passes legacy actor state through unchanged as a no-op migration.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (home page, event registration, artist portal, admin dashboard) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose of each component, page, and hook in the application.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS stylesheet defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, primary, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Sound Wave Publishing & Media Platform React app, mounting the app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component that sets up TanStack Router with all route definitions, wraps the app in global providers, and conditionally renders Header/Footer, profile setup dialogs, and payment gateway configuration dialogs based on auth and admin state.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable UI component that displays either a 'Login Required' or 'Unauthorized' error card with an appropriate icon and a back-to-home navigation button.
frontend/src/components/AdminAccountingT: Displays a paginated table of all financial transactions fetched via `useGetAccountingLog`, shows total revenue, and allows exporting the log as a CSV file.
frontend/src/components/AdminRegistratio: Renders a table of all event registrations fetched via `useGetAllEventRegistrations`, showing attendee details and payment status, with CSV export functionality.
frontend/src/components/AdminShareholder: Shows a table of all shareholders fetched via `useGetAllShareholders`, displaying share ownership and payment info, with CSV export support.
frontend/src/components/bookkeeping/Invo: A dialog form for creating or editing invoice records tied to an artist and optionally a media item, supporting amount entry in dollars converted to cents and using create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/bookkeeping/Memb: A dialog form for recording or editing a membership fee payment (defaulting to $40) for a selected artist, using create/update mutation hooks and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/bookkeeping/Payo: A dialog form for creating or editing artist payout records, capturing amount, payout method, destination account, optional associated media, and notes via create/update mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/CreateArtistProf: A modal dialog form for creating a new artist profile, collecting name, bio, contact info, licensing info, and optional ElasticStage URL/ID, then submitting via `useCreateArtistProfile`.
frontend/src/components/CreateTrademarkD: A modal dialog for creating or editing a trademark record, supporting file uploads (PDF/image) with progress tracking and submitting via `useCreateTrademarkRecord` or `useUpdateTrademarkRecord`.
frontend/src/components/EditArtistProfil: A dialog component for editing an artist's profile fields (name, bio, contact info, licensing info, and optional ElasticStage URL/ID) with validation and mutation via `useUpdateArtistProfile`.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: A site footer component displaying the brand name, navigation links, legal/copyright info, and a caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: A sticky site header with logo, desktop/mobile navigation links (Home, Events, Artist Portal, Admin), and Internet Identity-based authentication controls with a user profile dropdown.
frontend/src/components/LightscribeCanva: An interactive HTML5 canvas component for designing CD label artwork, supporting draggable text and image elements, selection highlighting, background color, and PNG export.
frontend/src/components/LightscribeProje: A dialog for creating or editing Lightscribe CD label projects, combining the LightscribeCanvas with project metadata fields and saving/exporting the design as canvas JSON, a preview PNG, and LSA/LSD files.
frontend/src/components/MediaCard.tsx: A card component that displays a media item's thumbnail or icon, type badge, title, description, and starting license price, linking to the media detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/MerchantServices: A modal dialog shown to admins when Authorize.net merchant services are not yet configured, allowing them to enter API credentials, endpoint, and allowed countries.
frontend/src/components/NationalBankcard: A modal dialog shown to admins when National Bankcard is not yet configured, allowing them to enter merchant ID, API key, endpoint, and allowed countries.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSettingsD: An admin-only settings dialog that displays configuration status and forms for all three payment providers (Stripe, Merchant Services, National Bankcard) in a single interface.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupDial: A blocking modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name and email to create a profile before using the app.
frontend/src/components/SharePurchaseFor: A form component for purchasing shares at $1 each, supporting a free-share discount and redirecting to a Stripe payment URL or directly to success for free-only purchases.
frontend/src/components/StripeSetupDialo: A modal dialog shown to admins when Stripe is not yet configured, allowing them to enter a secret key and allowed countries to enable payment processing.
frontend/src/components/SubmitPieceDialo: A dialog component that allows artists to submit a new musical piece with a title and optional description, using the useSubmitMusicalPiece mutation hook and displaying toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/UploadMediaDialo: A dialog component for uploading media files (images, etc.) with metadata including title, description, media type, copyright info, and configurable licensing options, tracking upload progress via ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, initializing access control with an admin token when authenticated and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via an AuthClient wrapper.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks (useQuery/useMutation) for all backend actor calls, covering user profiles, artist profiles, media, purchases, and other domain entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a dark music-industry CSS theme with gold/amber accent variables.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminAnalyticsPage.ts: Admin-only page that displays referral analytics data in tables and cards, with guards for authentication, admin role, and loading/error states.
Admin-only page for managing bookkeeping records (membership fees, invoices, payouts) with tabbed tables supporting create, edit, and delete via dialog components.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with tabs for Shareholders, Event Registrations, and Accounting Log, protected by authentication and admin-role checks.
frontend/src/pages/AdminUserRolesPage.ts: Admin-only page for managing user roles and permissions, allowing admins to view all users, assign roles via a dropdown, and delete users with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ArtistDashboard.tsx: Artist dashboard page with tabs for managing artist profile, media works, sales, trademarks, and Lightscribe projects, including create/edit/delete functionality for each resource.
frontend/src/pages/ArtistPortalPage.tsx: Artist portal page showing submission progress toward eligibility (15 pieces required), share ownership status, and options to submit pieces or purchase shares in Sound Waves Publishing & Media.
frontend/src/pages/ArtistProfilePage.tsx: Public artist profile page displaying an artist's bio, contact info, ElasticStage link, licensing information, and a gallery of their media works.
frontend/src/pages/CheckoutHandoffPage.t: Checkout handoff page that handles pre-checkout authentication, constructs a unified checkout session from URL query params (mediaId, licenseId, paymentMethod), and redirects to payment on login.
frontend/src/pages/EmbedVideoPage.tsx: Embeddable video player page that fetches media by ID, renders an HTML5 video element, records an analytics event on view, and provides a link to the full media page.
frontend/src/pages/EventRegistrationFail: Displays a payment cancelled page for event registration, informing the user no charges were made and offering buttons to retry or return home.
frontend/src/pages/EventRegistrationPage: Renders an event registration form collecting attendee name, email, and ticket quantity, then initiates a Stripe checkout session via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/pages/EventRegistrationSucc: Shows a confirmation page after successful event registration payment, prompting the user to visit the Artist Portal or return home.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Sound Waves Publishing & Media featuring a hero section, stats bar, and feature highlights with navigation to event registration and the artist portal.
frontend/src/pages/MediaDetailPage.tsx: Displays details for a specific media item including licensing options, and handles multi-provider checkout (Stripe, Merchant Services, National Bankcard) for license purchases.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailure.tsx: Shows a payment cancelled card, records a payment_failure_view analytics event, and provides navigation to browse works or go back.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccess.tsx: Shows a payment success card, records a payment_success_view analytics event, and offers navigation to browse more works or go to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/SharePurchaseFailureP: Displays a cancelled share purchase page informing the user no charges were made, with options to retry via the artist portal or return home.
frontend/src/pages/SharePurchaseSuccessP: Confirms a successful share purchase in Sound Waves Publishing & Media and provides navigation to view shares in the artist portal or return home.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), an extended color palette using oklch (including gold and sidebar tokens), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the Sound Waves Publishing and Media app's corporate structure, existing features, architectural notes (ICP/Motoko backend, Stripe integration), and known build issues.
